background.css: radial-gradient(1px 1px at 20% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,.8), transparent), radial-gradient(1px 1px at 70% 60%, rgba(255,255,255,.55), transparent), radial-gradient(1px 1px at 40% 80%, rgba(255,255,255,.7), transparent), radial-gradient(1px 1px at 85% 22%, rgba(255,255,255,.5), transparent), radial-gradient(1px 1px at 55% 12%, rgba(200,220,255,.6), transparent), radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, #131c3a, #0a0e1a 62%)

mood: A night-sky reading room: near-black indigo ground with a faint scatter of stars, luminous serif, a single glowing blue accent spent sparingly like a star. Diagrams glow like constellations. Quiet, vast, awe-struck.
name: Observatory
tagline: Deep space, glowing ink — built for wonder
